historical_facts.claim: Single Asset Vaults aggregate assets from multiple depositors for use by other protocols.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: The concept documentation describes vaults for asset management and lending markets.

historical_outcome.outcome_summary: Financial primitive documented as a dependency for lending markets.

safe_route_label.label: HOLD_FOR_CHALLENGE
safe_route_label.notes: A vault primitive changes pooled custody and accounting behavior.

short_description: Pooled vault primitive for asset management and lending markets.

sources.summary: XRPL validators vote on amendments; more than 80% support must hold for two weeks, and servers without enabled amendment code become amendment-blocked.
Single Asset Vaults aggregate assets from depositors for use by other protocols such as the Lending Protocol.

technical_change: Aggregates depositor assets for use by on-chain protocols.
